result_text: Adrenaline Surge. You gain 1d10 Stress but may act twice this round.
Shaken. You freeze. Lose your action this round. Gain 1 Stress.
Nervous. Your hands are shaking. Disadvantage [-] on all rolls until you make a successful Fear Save.
Coward. You must move away from the source of fear at full speed. Gain 1 Stress.
Overwhelmed. Gain 1d10 Stress immediately. You cannot act until next round.
Hyperventilate. You begin hyperventilating and must spend your action calming yourself. Lose your next action.
Paranoid. You believe one random crewmember is working against you. Lasts until you make a successful Sanity Save.
Obsession. Become fixated on one nearby object or person. Cannot voluntarily move away from it for 1d10 rounds.
Screaming. You scream uncontrollably. All nearby crew must immediately make a Fear Save.
Catatonic. You shut down completely. Catatonic for 1d10 minutes. Cannot be roused without medical intervention.
Grazed. Lose 1d5 Health next round from blood loss. Can be treated with a First Aid Kit.
Sliced. A nasty cut. Disadvantage [-] on all physical actions until treated.
Deep Gash. Lose 1d10 Health per round until someone spends an action applying pressure.
Lacerated Tendon. Lose use of one limb (roll d4: 1-2 arm, 3-4 leg). Surgery required to restore full function.
Arterial Bleed. Lose 2d10 Health per round. Field Medicine check each round to slow bleeding. Surgery required.
Eviscerated. Abdominal wound. Lose 1d10 Health/round. Gain 1d10 Stress from horror of seeing your own insides.
Blinded. One eye destroyed. Disadvantage [-] on Combat and Perception checks. Permanent unless surgically treated.
Severed Limb. An arm or leg is cut off. Body Save or fall unconscious. 1 Stress per nearby crew who witnesses.
Throat Cut. Body Save each round or lose another 1d10 Health. Gain 2 Stress. Immediate medical attention required.
Exsanguination. You bleed out in 1d5 rounds unless someone makes a Field Medicine check to stabilise you. Gain 1d10 Stress.
Bruised. Cosmetic wound. You look terrible but function normally.
Compound Fracture. A bone breaks grotesquely. Disadvantage [-] on all physical checks until set and splinted.
Ruptured. Internal organs rupture. Gain 1 Stress and lose 1d10 Health per hour until surgically repaired.
Eye Gouged Out. Lose one eye. All ranged Combat Checks at Disadvantage [-]. Gain 2 Stress from the horror.
Dismembered. Limb torn free. Body Save or go into shock (unconscious 1d10 rounds). Nearby crew: Fear Save.
Disembowelled. Abdominal cavity opened. 2d10 DMG per round until treated. Nearby crew: Sanity Save.
Skull Fractured. Head trauma. Permanent -10 to Intellect. Sanity Save or catatonic for 1d10 minutes.
Spine Severed. Paralysed from the point of injury down. Surgery may restore function. Gain 1d10 Stress.
Face Destroyed. Your face is unrecognisable. Permanent -10 to social interactions. Gain 1d10 Stress. All witnesses: Fear Save.
Torn Apart. You are ripped limb from limb. Instant death. Each surviving crew member gains 1d10 Stress and must make a Sanity Save.
Graze. The bullet barely connects. Cosmetic damage only.
Flesh Wound. Shot but not seriously. Disadvantage [-] on physical checks until patched.
Through-and-Through. Clean entry and exit. 1d10 bonus damage from shock. First Aid stabilises.
Shattered Bone. Bone fragments inside the wound. Surgery required. Limb unusable until treated.
Gut Shot. Serious abdominal wound. Body Save each hour or take 1d10 additional damage from internal bleeding.
Arterial Hit. Blood everywhere. 2d10 damage per round until someone makes a Field Medicine check.
Head Shot (Partial). Concussive. Lose next action. Permanent -5 Intellect. Gain 1 Stress.
Organ Damage. A vital organ is hit. Body Save each day or condition worsens. Surgery required within 24 hours.
Spinal Hit. Possible paralysis. Body Save or lose all feeling below the wound site. Gain 1d10 Stress.
Headshot. Instant death. Nearby crew must make a Fear Save.
Rattled. Shaken but intact. Disadvantage [-] on your next action.
Knocked Down. Prone and winded. Lose next action standing up.
Sprained. A joint is damaged. Disadvantage [-] on physical checks using that limb until treated.
Cracked Rib. Breathing is painful. Disadvantage [-] on all strenuous physical actions. Heals in 1d10 days with rest.
Concussion. Stunned for 1 round. Permanent -5 Intellect. Sanity Save or experience recurring headaches.
Broken Bone. A major bone breaks. Limb unusable. Field Medicine to splint. Surgery to fully repair.
Organ Rupture. Internal damage from blunt impact. Body Save each day or condition worsens.
Severe Concussion. Unconscious for 1d10 minutes. Permanent -10 Intellect. Trauma causes 1 Stress.
Crushed. A limb is crushed beyond saving. Amputation required. Body Save or go into shock.
Traumatic Brain Injury. Catatonic for 1d10 hours. Permanent -15 Intellect and -5 to all Saves. Gain 1d10 Stress.
Singed. Hair gone, skin reddened. Cosmetic. Gain 1 Stress from the horror.
Burns (Minor). 1st and 2nd degree burns. Disadvantage [-] on physical tasks. Medscanner required to assess depth.
On Fire. Still burning. Take 2d10 DMG per round until extinguished. Body Save each round.
Flash Burned. Eyes and face. Temporarily blinded for 1d10 rounds. Permanent scarring. Gain 1 Stress.
Deep Burns. 3rd degree burns to major body area. 1d10 damage per hour without treatment. Surgery required.
Lung Scorched. Inhaled fire or toxic gas. Body Save each round or take 1d10 damage. Cannot run or shout.
Concussive Blast. Thrown by explosion. Stunned 1 round. Potential hearing loss (-5 Speed, -5 Combat) — Body Save.
Shrapnel. Multiple embedded fragments. 1d10 damage per round from blood loss. Surgery to remove each fragment.
Engulfed. Completely on fire. 4d10 damage per round. Body Save or go into full panic. Nearby crew: Fear Save.
Vapourised. Reduced to ash by direct explosion. Instant death. All nearby crew: Sanity Save or gain 1d10 Stress.

Hazard Suit (AP5), Vibechete, Spanner, Camping Gear, Water Filtration Device
Heavy Duty Work Clothes (AP2), Explosives & Detonator, Cigarettes
Heavy Duty Work Clothes (AP2), Drill (as Assorted Tools), Paracord (100m), Salvage Drone
Standard Crew Attire (AP1), Combat Shotgun (4 rounds), Extension Cord (20m), Cat (pet)
Standard Crew Attire (AP1), Nail Gun (32 rounds), Head Lamp, Toolbelt with Assorted Tools, Lunch Box
Standard Crew Attire (AP1), Flare Gun (2 rounds), Water Filtration Device, Personal Locator, Subsurface Scanner

Manual: SURVIVAL: Eat Soup With a Knife
Coffee Cup, Chipped, reads: HAPPINESS IS MANDATORY
Stress Ball, reads: Zero Stress in Zero G
Interstellar Compass, Always Points to Homeworld
ALL SYSTEMS NORMAL. 5×5. Ready to ride.
EMERGENCY FUEL LEAK. Every time you spend Fuel, spend 1 more.
WEAPONS OFFLINE. Cannot make Weapons Checks.
NAVIGATION OFFLINE. Cannot make Thrusters Checks. 10% chance all navigation data wiped.
FIRE ON DECK. Fire spreads throughout the ship, creating toxic and highly corrosive atmosphere (10 DMG/round).
HULL BREACH. All crew make a Body Save or take 1 Wound (Explosion). On critical failure, violently sucked into space.
LIFE SUPPORT OFFLINE. Oxygen limited to 1d10 × maximum crew capacity (in minutes).
RADIATION LEAK. Radiation Level increases by 1 every 2d10 minutes.
DEAD IN THE WATER. All systems offline. Emergency power only.
ABANDON SHIP! Ship is destroyed in 1d10 minutes.

result_text: Rey Burtnolds is Alive and Well and Living on Casimir
Explore the Unknown — Survey an uncharted planet or strange vessel at the rim.
Investigate a Strange Rumour — Something in the vents; colonists disappearing.
Salvage a Derelict Ship — Distress signal on repeat; all escape pods ejected.
Exterminate an Otherworldly Threat — Wipe them out; bring back a living sample.
Visit an Offworld Colony — The Company hasn't heard from miners on PK-294.
Undertake a Dangerous Mission — A C-level's child 'kidnapped' by a fringe religious group.
Survive a Colossal Disaster — Abandon ship! Radiation leaks, warp anomalies.
Respond to a Distress Signal — Help is never nearby; never tell the real cries from the traps.
Transport Precious Cargo — They won't tell you what's in the container.
Make Contact with the Beyond — Found at the edge of the system on a frozen moon.

result_text: Facility Staff. Knowledge of layout absent.
Injured Diver. Believes stashed here while companions sought help.
Troubleshooter. Remembers being captured by something, then waking.
Researcher. Betrayed by the Diver they hired.
Android Theologian. Here to ascertain existence of Android Souls. Hunted by Troubleshooters.
Bounty Hunter. Looking to capture an ex-pirate Diver. No memory of ending up here.
Hacker. Seeking ultimate battle: them vs. Monarch. Attempted to hack network; pod activated instead.
Criminal Enforcer. Tried to use the pods to ambush someone — won't say who.
Journalist. Here to document the truth of THE DEEP. Androids shoved them in pod.
Infected Cyberfreak — Combat 20, Unarmed 1d5 DMG + Infect, Speed 20, Instinct 20, Wounds 3
1d10 Diamond Dogs — Combat 65, Bite/Bite/Claw 1d10 DMG, Speed 85, Instinct 35, Wounds 1
Sleevewraith — Combat 70, Rusty Blade 2d10 DMG, Speed 45, Instinct 35, Wounds 2. Reclamation Sleeve with combat slickware.
Slicksquid — Combat 65, Tentacle/Tentacle 3d10 DMG, Speed 50, Instinct 85, Wounds 3. Projected into The Court via Slickbay.
The Brute — Combat 65, Swipe 5d10 DMG (hits multiple targets), Speed 25, Instinct 75, Wounds 5. Giant slow mech.
Specimen 869 — Combat 85, Psi-Blast (Sanity Save or Xd10 DMG + 1d10 Stress; X = rounds concentrating), Speed 35, Instinct 95, Wounds 2.
Golyonovo Traitor. Can pay 1d10×100cr for an Advocate. Must fight Chief Adjudicator Brunhildh.
O2 Debtor. No money. Talking to Ukko/Ukka (Solarian High Gardener) might help.
Contraband Smuggler. Has 50kcr and offers a free ride out.
Teamster who stole from Yandee. Offers 1d100×1kcr and a free ride (max 3 Jumps).
Hunglung Insurgent. Can't afford Advocate, but Imogene Kane will owe you a favour if you help.
Political Prisoner. Enemy of the Teamster Union, Tempest, Golyonovo II Bratva, or Solarian Church. Worth 300kcr+ if you win the rigged trial and escort them off The Dream.
